title: Belshar Othacuu

'''Belshar Othacuu''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] astronomical object located in the [[Belshar sector/Legends|Belshar sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a covert installation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]] was established there, with a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of military supplies scheduled to be transported to the facility. Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Belshar Othacuu was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Belshar Othacuu was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="CRO" /> situated in the [[Belshar Othacuu system/Legends|Belshar Othacuu system]], a part of the [[Belshar sector/Legends|Belshar sector]]<ref name="EGTW" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="NewTerritories" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It lay on the [[Namadii Corridor/Legends|Namadii Corridor]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Ord Varee system/Legends|Ord Varee system]] as well as the [[Glee Anselm system]] of the neighboring [[Jalor sector/Legends|Jalor sector]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
[[File:Compnor_logo.svg|thumb|right|300px|A covert installation of the Commission for the Preservation of the New Order (emblem pictured) was established on Belshar Othacuu.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], at one point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a new covert installation of the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was established on Belshar Othacuu. The [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]–based [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] deep-cover penetration agent [[Bonic Tarracus]], known by his codename "Corewatch," eventually learned of a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of military supplies that was being assembled in preparation for transportation to the facility, a fact that Tarracus relayed to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]].<ref name="CRO" />

Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] later noted Corewatch's report on the convoy headed to Belshar Othacuu in an entry dedicated to the agent that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" /> Belshar Othacuu was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Belshar Othacuu was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Belshar Othacuu [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body, in grid square J-7.<ref name="TEA" />
